  <!-- Performance API Polyfills -->
  <script>
  (function () {
    var noop = function noop() {};
    if ("performance" in window === false) {
      window.performance = {};
    }
    window.performance.mark = performance.mark || noop;
    window.performance.measure = performance.measure || noop;
    if ("now" in window.performance === false) {
      var nowOffset = Date.now();
      if (performance.timing && performance.timing.navigationStart) {
        nowOffset = performance.timing.navigationStart;
      }
      window.performance.now = function now() {
        return Date.now() - nowOffset;
      };
    }
  })();
  </script>
  <!-- Globals Definitions -->
  <script>
    (function () {
      var now = Date.now()
      window.initialTimestamps = {
        initialTimestamp: now,
        initialRequestTimestamp: Math.round(performance.timeOrigin ? performance.timeOrigin : now - performance.now())
      }
      window.thunderboltTag = "libs-releases-GA-local"
      window.thunderboltVersion = "1.16529.0"
    })();
  </script>

</head>
<body class="">
<script type="text/javascript">
    var bodyCacheable = true;
    var exclusionReason = {"shouldRender":true,"forced":false};
    var ssrInfo = {"cacheExclusionReason":"","renderBodyTime":563,"renderTimeStamp":1764271922457}
</script>
    <!--pageHtmlEmbeds.bodyStart start-->
    <script type="wix/htmlEmbeds" id="pageHtmlEmbeds.bodyStart start"></script>
    <script type="wix/htmlEmbeds" id="pageHtmlEmbeds.bodyStart end"></script>
    <!--pageHtmlEmbeds.bodyStart end-->
<script id="wix-first-paint">
    if (window.ResizeObserver &&
        (!window.PerformanceObserver || !PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes || PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes.indexOf('paint') === -1)) {
        new ResizeObserver(function (entries, observer) {
            entries.some(function (entry) {
                var contentRect = entry.contentRect;
                if (contentRect.width > 0 && contentRect.height > 0) {
                    requestAnimationFrame(function (now) {
                        window.wixFirstPaint = now;
                        dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('wixFirstPaint'));
                    });
                    observer.disconnect();
                    return true;
                }
            });
        }).observe(document.body);
    }
</script>
    <!-- domStoreHtml -->

tabindex="-1" aria-label="About Champ"><div id="aboutchamp"></div><span class="mHZSwn">About Champ</span></div><section id="comp-iob7fnzq" class="comp-iob7fnzq CohWsy wixui-column-strip"><div id="bgLayers_comp-iob7fnzq" data-hook="bgLayers" data-motion-part="BG_LAYER comp-iob7fnzq" class="if7Vw2"><div data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="tcElKx i1tH8h"></div><div id="bgMedia_comp-iob7fnzq" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA comp-iob7fnzq" class="wG8dni"></div></div><div data-testid="columns" class="V5AUxf"><div id="mediairc2azfv1" class="mediairc2azfv1 YzqVVZ wixui-column-strip__column"><div id="bgLayers_mediairc2azfv1" data-hook="bgLayers" data-motion-part="BG_LAYER mediairc2azfv1" class="MW5IWV"><div data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="LWbAav Kv1aVt"></div><div id="bgMedia_mediairc2azfv1" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA mediairc2azfv1" class="VgO9Yg"></div></div><div data-mesh-id="mediairc2azfv1inlineContent" data-testid="inline-content" class=""><div data-mesh-id="mediairc2azfv1inlineContent-gridContainer" data-testid="mesh-container-content"><div id="comp-iob88ssw" class="Z_l5lU ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-iob88ssw wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h4 class="font_4 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:72px; line-height:1.1em; text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:72px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="color_15 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:wfont_4e3617_e84109114e2e4fd4bb3c0ad433e49d34,wf_e84109114e2e4fd4bb3c0ad43,orig_aktiv_grotesk_ex_xbold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:-0.02em;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">ABOUT CHAMP</span></span></span></span></h4></div><div id="comp-iobbwstw" class="Z_l5lU ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-iobbwstw wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Cordell Broadus aka Champ Medici </span></span></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">is an entrepreneur, investor, and philanthropist.</span></span></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;">&nbsp;</p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">He is widely regarded as one of the most important players in the developing sector, </span></span><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">having been a key architect and influence over his father, </span></span><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Snoop Dogg&#39;s foray and successes in the burgeoning Web3.0 space -projects that he actively oversees.&nbsp;</span></span></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixGuard wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Cordell Broadus sits in the intersection of traditional and digital entertainment. </span></span><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Apart from being a staunch advocate of the possibilities that Web3.0 may bring, </span></span><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Champ Medici is a renowned crypto entrepreneur and investor, having built up a large and </span></span><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">credible portfolio of crypto and NFT investments, </span></span><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">while always having his hand firmly on the pulse of all things Web3.0. Today, he has his hand in all things Music (as a co-founder of Sharestix), Gaming (launching Death Row Games), Consumer Goods (Hanjan & Dr Bombay), Consultancy and Real Estate.&nbsp;</span></span></p></div><div class="comp-iojzkej7 FubTgk" id="comp-iojzkej7" aria-disabled="false"><a data-testid="linkElement" data-anchor="dataItem-ioclahoa" data-anchor-comp-id="comp-ioclaho9" href="/" target="_self" class="uDW_Qe wixui-button PlZyDq" aria-disabled="false" aria-label="CLICK HERE TO BOOK CHAMP"><span class="l7_2fn wixui-button__label">CLICK HERE TO BOOK CHAMP</span></a></div><div id="comp-lb3u8qu2" class="comp-lb3u8qu2 WzbAF8"><ul class="mpGTIt" aria-label="Social Bar"><li id="dataItem-lb3u8qus1-comp-lb3u8qu2" data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="LWbAav Kv1aVt"></div><div id="bgMedia_comp-lb3f1rzd2" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA comp-lb3f1rzd2" class="VgO9Yg"></div></div><div data-mesh-id="comp-lb3f1rzd2inlineContent" data-testid="inline-content" class=""><div data-mesh-id="comp-lb3f1rzd2inlineContent-gridContainer" data-testid="mesh-container-content"><section id="comp-iobcszr8" class="comp-iobcszr8 CohWsy wixui-column-strip"><div id="bgLayers_comp-iobcszr8" data-hook="bgLayers" data-motion-part="BG_LAYER comp-iobcszr8" class="if7Vw2"><div data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="tcElKx i1tH8h"></div><div id="bgMedia_comp-iobcszr8" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA comp-iobcszr8" class="wG8dni"></div></div><div data-testid="columns" class="V5AUxf"><div id="mediairc2azfx3" class="mediairc2azfx3 YzqVVZ wixui-column-strip__column"><div id="bgLayers_mediairc2azfx3" data-hook="bgLayers" data-motion-part="BG_LAYER mediairc2azfx3" class="MW5IWV"><div data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="LWbAav Kv1aVt"></div><div id="bgMedia_mediairc2azfx3" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA mediairc2azfx3" class="VgO9Yg"></div></div><div data-mesh-id="mediairc2azfx3inlineContent" data-testid="inline-content" class=""><div data-mesh-id="mediairc2azfx3inlineContent-gridContainer" data-testid="mesh-container-content"><div id="comp-lb3z4np0" class="Z_l5lU ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lb3z4np0 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h4 class="font_4 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:72px; line-height:1.1em; text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:72px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="color_15 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:wfont_4e3617_e84109114e2e4fd4bb3c0ad433e49d34,wf_e84109114e2e4fd4bb3c0ad43,orig_aktiv_grotesk_ex_xbold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:-0.02em;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">OUR VENTURES</span></span></span></span></h4></div><div id="comp-lb3z4np5" class="Z_l5lU ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lb3z4np5 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">We advise, partner up with, and invest into strong founders and management executives with world changing ideas and a passion to execute.&nbsp;</span></span></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixGuard wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">We like companies that develop blockchain and Web3 leadership in social gaming, security, music, intellectual property in entertainment, and almost anything within the creator economy.&nbsp;</span></span></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixGuard wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">We absolutely love founders that are courageous and committed to making this new world a better place for generations to come.</span></span><br class="wixui-rich-text__text">
&nbsp;</p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Connect with us if you would like Champ Medici and his team for advisory, partnership, or investment.<br class="wixui-rich-text__text">

data-motion-part="BG_LAYER comp-lb40boaj" class="if7Vw2"><div data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="tcElKx i1tH8h"></div><div id="bgMedia_comp-lb40boaj" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA comp-lb40boaj" Vq6kJx comp-lb40ta5s wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h2 class="font_2 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:40px; line-height:normal; text-align:center;"><span style="color:#E2CC0F;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:wfont_4e3617_e84109114e2e4fd4bb3c0ad433e49d34,wf_e84109114e2e4fd4bb3c0ad43,orig_aktiv_grotesk_ex_xbold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:40px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:0.01em;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">CHAMP MEDICI LOUNGE</span></span></span></span></h2></div><div id="comp-lb40qdk6" class="Z_l5lU ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lb40qdk6 wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="color_11 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">The Champ Medici Lounge is a luxurious pop-up lounge that hosts a series of activations that happen during major events and festivals globally.</span></span></span></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="color_11 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="wixGuard wixui-rich-text__text">​</span></span></span></span></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="color_11 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">The Champ Medici Lounge aims to bring the best of Crypto, NFT, Web 3.0 founders, creators, creatives and investors globally together. The lounge has been part of NFT Los Angeles, NFT New York City, F1 Singapore, and Art Basel Miami.</span></span></span></p></div><div class="comp-lb4ty9s8 FubTgk" id="comp-lb4ty9s8" aria-disabled="false"><a data-testid="linkElement" data-anchor="anchors-lb4mcifv" href="events" target="_self" class="uDW_Qe wixui-button PlZyDq" aria-disabled="false" aria-label="CLICK HERE TO SEE OUR PAST ACTIVATIONS"><span class="l7_2fn wixui-button__label">CLICK HERE TO SEE OUR PAST ACTIVATIONS</span></a></div></div></div></div></div></section><section id="comp-lb40dn2i" class="comp-lb40dn2i i1tH8h"></div><div id="bgMedia_comp-lb40dn2i" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA comp-lb40dn2i" class="wG8dni"></div></div><div data-testid="columns" class="V5AUxf"><div id="comp-lb40dn3u" Vq6kJx comp-lb41apzz wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h2 class="font_2 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:40px; line-height:normal; text-align:center;"><span style="color:#E2CC0F;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:wfont_4e3617_e84109114e2e4fd4bb3c0ad433e49d34,wf_e84109114e2e4fd4bb3c0ad43,orig_aktiv_grotesk_ex_xbold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:40px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:0.01em;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">CHAMP MEDICI DEMO NIGHT</span></span></span></span></h2></div><div id="comp-lb41aq0g" class="Z_l5lU ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lb41aq0g wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="color_11 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">The Champ Medici Demo Night is an invite-only cocktail night where 15-20 founders that Team Medici has curated pitch their idea and network with 50 selected investors.</span></span></span><br class="wixui-rich-text__text">
&nbsp;</p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="color_11 wixui-rich-text__text"><span OUR DEMO NIGHT</span></a></div></div></div></div></div></section><section id="comp-lb40e9nb" class="comp-lb40e9nb CohWsy wixui-column-strip"><div id="bgLayers_comp-lb40e9nb" data-hook="bgLayers" session.</span></span></span></p></div><div id="comp-lb41gba0" class="bkIuWA comp-lb41gba0"><div data-mesh-id="comp-lb41gba0inlineContent" data-testid="inline-content" class=""><div comp-lb3f1rze wixui-section" data-block-level-container="ClassicSection"><div id="bgLayers_comp-lb3f1rze" data-hook="bgLayers" data-motion-part="BG_LAYER comp-lb3f1rze" class="MW5IWV"><div data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="LWbAav Kv1aVt"></div><div id="bgMedia_comp-lb3f1rze" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA comp-lb3f1rze" class="VgO9Yg"></div></div><div data-mesh-id="comp-lb3f1rzeinlineContent" data-testid="inline-content" class=""><div data-mesh-id="comp-lb3f1rzeinlineContent-gridContainer" data-testid="mesh-container-content"><section id="comp-iochz7tx" class="comp-iochz7tx CohWsy wixui-column-strip"><div id="bgLayers_comp-iochz7tx" data-hook="bgLayers" data-motion-part="BG_LAYER comp-iochz7tx" class="if7Vw2"><div data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="tcElKx i1tH8h"></div><div id="bgMedia_comp-iochz7tx" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA comp-iochz7tx" class="wG8dni"></div></div><div data-testid="columns" class="V5AUxf"><div id="mediairc2azfy8" class="mediairc2azfy8 YzqVVZ wixui-column-strip__column"><div id="bgLayers_mediairc2azfy8" data-hook="bgLayers" data-motion-part="BG_LAYER mediairc2azfy8" class="MW5IWV"><div data-testid="colorUnderlay" class="LWbAav Kv1aVt"></div><div id="bgMedia_mediairc2azfy8" data-motion-part="BG_MEDIA mediairc2azfy8" class="VgO9Yg"></div></div><div data-mesh-id="mediairc2azfy8inlineContent" data-testid="inline-content" class=""><div data-mesh-id="mediairc2azfy8inlineContent-gridContainer" data-testid="mesh-container-content"><div id="comp-lb41kglb" class="Z_l5lU ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lb41kglb wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h4 class="font_4 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:72px; line-height:1.1em; text-align:center;"><span style="font-size:72px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="color_15 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:wfont_4e3617_e84109114e2e4fd4bb3c0ad433e49d34,wf_e84109114e2e4fd4bb3c0ad43,orig_aktiv_grotesk_ex_xbold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:-0.02em;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">OUR FUND</span></span></span></span></h4></div><div id="comp-lb41kglt" class="Z_l5lU ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lb41kglt wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px; text-align:center;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">In partnership with the Tezos foundation from November 2022, Cordell worked alongside them to set up the Champ Medici Arts Fund (CMAF) and deploy capital to minority communities to guide and educate artists on creating artworks on Web3 using blockchain technology.</span></span></p></div><div id="comp-lb41ln30" class="jbrj02 comp-lb41ln30"><div class="IvR70V wixui-box" data-testid="container-bg"></div><div data-mesh-id="comp-lb41ln30inlineContent" data-testid="inline-content" class=""><div data-mesh-id="comp-lb41ln30inlineContent-gridContainer" data-testid="mesh-container-content"><div id="comp-lb41peis" class="Z_l5lU ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lb41peis wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h2 class="font_2 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:36px; line-height:1.1em;"><span style="font-size:36px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-family:wfont_4e3617_e84109114e2e4fd4bb3c0ad433e49d34,wf_e84109114e2e4fd4bb3c0ad43,orig_aktiv_grotesk_ex_xbold;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span class="color_15 wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="letter-spacing:0.01em;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">Champ Medici Arts Fund</span></span></span></span></h2></div><div id="comp-lb41ouvx" class="Z_l5lU ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lb41ouvx wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">The Champ Medici Arts Fund will officially launch on January 2, 2023. </span></span></p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px;">&nbsp;</p>
<p class="font_8 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:16px;"><span style="font-family:rubik-light,sans-serif;" class="wixui-rich-text__text"><span style="font-size:16px;" class="wixui-rich-text__text">The fund will begin accepting applications on December 5, 2022.</span></span></p></div><div id="comp-lb4hm4nf" class="Z_l5lU ku3DBC zQ9jDz qvSjx3 Vq6kJx comp-lb4hm4nf wixui-rich-text" data-testid="richTextElement"><h2 class="font_2 wixui-rich-text__text" style="font-size:13px;         <script>
			const wixAdsOffsetHeight = document.getElementById('WIX_ADS')?.offsetHeight || 0;
			const header = document.getElementsByTagName('header')[0];
			let headerOffsetHeight = 0;
			if (header) {
				const headerPosition = window.getComputedStyle(header).getPropertyValue('position').toLowerCase();
				const isHeaderStickyOrFixed = headerPosition === 'sticky' || headerPosition === 'fixed';
				headerOffsetHeight = isHeaderStickyOrFixed ? header.offsetHeight : 0;
			}
			document.documentElement.style.scrollPaddingTop = `${wixAdsOffsetHeight + headerOffsetHeight}px`;
        </script>
